---
title: "About Me"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/513evan
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com
---
I am a data-driven finance professional with over 12 years of experience in international banking, specializing in trade finance, risk analysis, and process optimization. I have led cross-functional projects that integrate data analytics, automation, and machine learning to improve operational efficiency and decision quality.

Currently pursuing a Master of Science in Business Analytics at the University of California, Irvine, I focus on predictive modeling, statistical analysis, and operational analytics. My recent work includes developing occupancy forecasting models and building data-driven decision tools for real estate portfolio management.

I am passionate about using data to enhance financial systems, improve risk management, and support strategic decision-making in global banking and international trade.
